description: Migration adds `clients.inbound_ticket_defaults_id` as nullable field (or configured equivalent)
Migration adds `contacts.inbound_ticket_defaults_id` as nullable field (or configured equivalent)
Migration adds expected indexes for client/contact destination lookup and integrity
Migration down path cleanly removes added fields/indexes
Resolver precedence: exact sender contact with contact override selects contact destination
Resolver precedence: exact sender contact without override selects contact's client destination
Resolver precedence: no exact contact + domain-matched client selects domain-matched client destination
Resolver precedence: no contact/domain destination falls back to provider default
Resolver falls back to provider default when contact override destination is inactive/invalid
Resolver falls back to provider default when client destination is inactive/invalid
In-app integration: exact sender contact override routes new ticket to override defaults board
In-app integration: exact sender contact without override routes to client default destination
In-app integration: unknown contact with domain-matched client routes to that client destination
In-app integration: unmatched sender uses provider default destination
Workflow integration: resolve_inbound_ticket_context returns contact-override destination outcome
Workflow integration: resolve_inbound_ticket_context returns client-default destination outcome
Workflow integration: resolve_inbound_ticket_context returns domain-matched client destination outcome
Workflow and in-app destination selection parity for same sender/provider input
Reply-token path unchanged: matching replies append comment and do not reroute board/defaults
Thread-header reply path unchanged: matching replies append comment and do not reroute board/defaults
Exact sender contact matching still resolves target client/contact IDs as before
Domain-to-client matching remains explicit via `client_inbound_email_domains` and does not infer from contacts
Client destination API/action enforces client update permission and tenant scoping
Contact override API/action enforces contact update permission and tenant scoping
ClientDetails UI can set and clear client inbound destination and persists correctly
Contact UI can set and clear contact inbound destination override and persists correctly
Structured logs include destination source classification and fallback reason when applicable
Idempotency regression: duplicate processing of same inbound message remains deduped under new routing model
